title: fierce canadian yellow curry bowl
description: a creamy, mustardy, monsoon-inspired yellow curry dish from canada, featuring whole30-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: fish sauce
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste (omittable if whole30 compliant)

instructions: poach the chicken breast in boiling water for 10 minutes, then set aside to rest.
heat the coconut milk in a saucepan over medium heat until warm.
add the yellow curry paste to the coconut milk and stir to combine.
reduce heat to low and simmer the curry paste in the coconut milk for 5 minutes.
add the sliced carrots, bell peppers, and zucchini to the saucepan and stir to combine.
return the poached chicken breast to the saucepan and stir to combine.
